name: @zaganjade/pi-multi-skill
description_en: Chain multiple skills via /skills — bundles (JSON/YAML), load modes, BMAD --auto, /skills-last, /skills-setup, conflict resolution, parallel dispatch, activation stats, bundle attribution for pi-usage.
description_zh: 通过 /skills 链接多个技能 — 包（JSON/YAML）、加载模式、BMAD --auto、/skills-last、/skills-setup、冲突解决、并行调度、激活统计、pi-usage 的包归因
